briefs.title: Drinking Water Rules Updated for Small Systems With Fewer Than 5 Home Connections
briefs.summary: BC updated its Drinking Water Protection Regulation to create a new category called 'specified domestic small system' — a small water system serving fewer than 5 private homes. These tiny systems now have their own set of rules separate from larger small systems.
briefs.action_required: Check if your property runs a small private water system serving fewer than 5 homes — if so, review your new compliance obligations.

key_dates.label: BC Drinking Water Protection Regulation amendments take effect

briefs.industries: Landlord & Property Mgmt, Agriculture, Natural Resources
